project_type: CSS-only design-token framework (no JS runtime), with Node dev tooling
build_system: Node scripts (scripts/bundle.js concatenates core/ + optional/ into dist/). npm run build
test_framework: Playwright regression suite (tests/). npm test. Also stylelint for CSS lint.
verification_instructions: 1. npm run lint:css (must pass), 2. npm run build (rebuild dist/), 3. npm test (Playwright regression)
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/ directory is regenerated by npm run build and must be committed. docs/tokens.md is regenerated by npm run docs:tokens.
setup_instructions: npm ci && npm run test:install (installs Chromium for Playwright)
environment_constraints: Network needed for npm ci. CSS-only changes need no compilation - source files ARE the product. dist/ is rebuilt via bundle.js.
contribution_requirements: Custom properties must start with --sf-. Keyframes start with sf-. Tokens not literals in base/layout/components. oklch() for colours. All rules in @layer. Label new tokens PUBLIC/INTERNAL/DEPRECATED. Keep alias chains <=3 hops. New .sf-* or .is-* classes need docs/demo.html coverage.
key_patterns: Tokens declared in :root inside @layer slashed.tokens. @property registrations at top of tokens.css (outside :root). Animation presets reference keyframes from motion.css. Spacing aliases flow: tokens.css (--sf-gap) -> tokens.layout.css (--sf-space-gap) -> layout.css primitives.
directory_structure: core/ = framework source CSS (tokens, layout, states, etc.), optional/ = opt-in modules (forms, components), dist/ = concatenated bundles (generated), docs/ = documentation, tests/ = Playwright tests, scripts/ = build/gen tooling
